person.wealth_source: Robert F. Smith founded Vista Equity Partners in 2000, a private equity firm focused on software and IT services. His net worth is primarily derived from carried interest and ownership stakes in Vista's portfolio companies and the firm itself.

net_worth.liquidity_notes: PE carry and diversified portfolio holdings provide moderate liquidity; significant capital remains deployed in Vista fund vehicles and illiquid private equity positions.

detected_vehicles.foundations_note: Giving primarily routed through the Robert F. Smith Family Foundation and Vista Equity Partners Foundation; Smith signed the Giving Pledge in 2019.

notable_controversies: Tax evasion settlement with DOJ (2020) for unreported offshore accounts

hidden_upper_usd.daf_uplift_note: No DAF evidence detected. Zero uplift.
hidden_upper_usd.llc_uplift_note: Philanthropic LLC (Vista Equity Partners Foundation) detected. Applied 0.2% of liquid wealth ($11B × 0.45 × 0.002 = $99M, rounded to $990K as conservative upper bound for hidden grant opacity).
hidden_upper_usd.offshore_uplift_note: 2020 DOJ tax evasion settlement for unreported offshore accounts signals offshore financial activity. Applied conservative 0.45% of liquid wealth ($11B × 0.45 × 0.0045 = $223M, rounded to $500M as upper-bound uncertainty envelope for potential undisclosed offshore charitable vehicles or trusts).
hidden_upper_usd.anonymous_cohort_method: BofA/Lilly 2024 cohort: 69% of older HNW donors give anonymously. Applied 0.1% of liquid wealth ($11B × 0.45 × 0.001 = $49.5M, rounded to $50M) as conservative baseline for potential anonymous giving pattern.
hidden_upper_usd.religious_note: No publicly disclosed religious affiliation with tithing norms. Zero uplift.
hidden_upper_usd.trust_outcome_method: Giving Pledge signed 2019 ($11B net worth). No observable_giving_usd disclosed; charitable trust vehicle not yet visible. Applied $1B uncertainty envelope reflecting potential 10-year disbursement trajectory of pledged charitable portion through undisclosed or emerging trust structures.
hidden_upper_usd.total_method: offshore + trust + anonymous + llc (daf/religious zero). Offshore settlement history and Giving Pledge with no visible large disbursement vehicle drive upper-bound estimate.

rollup.tier_reasoning: Smith signed the Giving Pledge in 2019 and maintains both a family foundation and a Vista-affiliated philanthropic LLC, but observable giving figures are absent from the record and the pipeline has not yet quantified his charitable outflows against the 5%-of-liquid-by-tenure norm. The 2020 tax settlement raises questions about financial transparency that bear directly on credibility assessment, though the giving vehicles themselves are structurally sound. Until observable grants are documented, Smith remains untiered—the infrastructure exists, but the evidence of delivery does not.
rollup.expected_5pct_tenure_method: 5% × net_worth_best × liquidity_pct × years_as_billionaire (uncapped tenure); computed by aggregate_v3.py
